description_long: This is a round, rustic loaf of bread with a thick, dark brown crust that displays a mottled pattern of grayish and golden hues. The surface is uneven, with natural cracks and creases, suggesting an artisanal baking process. The crust appears well-baked, with some areas darker than others, and a few lighter patches where flour may have been dusted before baking. The loaf is compact and dense, with no visible slices or openings, and its overall shape is slightly flattened rather than perfectly spherical. The texture of the crust looks rough and crunchy, while the interior is implied to be softer and more porous. There are no visible labels, branding, or packaging present on the bread.
description: A rustic, round loaf of bread with a thick, mottled brown and gray crust, featuring natural cracks and a rough, artisanal texture.
description_view_0: This view shows the rounded side of the loaf, highlighting the mottled gray and brown crust with visible cracks and a slightly domed top.
description_view_1: This angle emphasizes the elongated side of the bread, revealing more of the golden-brown crust and subtle surface creases.
description_view_2: The bottom view displays a darker, more uniformly brown crust with pronounced creases and a slightly flattened base.
description_view_3: This perspective shows a mix of dark and light crust areas, with a visible patch of flour and a rough, uneven surface.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust has a rustic, uneven pattern with natural cracks, mottled brown and gray coloring, and some areas dusted with flour. There are no visible seeds or decorative scoring, giving it a traditional, artisanal appearance.
